title: obra/superpowers
summary: Obra/superpowers 是一个代理技能框架和软件开发方法，旨在通过子代理驱动开发（Subagent-Driven Development）提升AI编程效率。它提供了结构化的工作流，支持头脑风暴、编码等任务，并集成了SDLC流程。该项目在GitHub上获得极高关注，表明其技术价值与AI相关性很强。
summary_en: Obra/superpowers is an agentic skills framework and software development methodology designed to enhance AI coding efficiency through subagent-driven development. It provides structured workflows for tasks like brainstorming and coding, integrating SDLC processes. The project has gained significant attention on GitHub, indicating strong technical value and AI relevance.
